description:
You are a mobile build-pipeline engineer.  
Inside the workspace /home/user/mobile_ci you will find one historical build log called build_pipeline.log.  

Goal  
1. Create a sub-directory called /home/user/mobile_ci/reports (if it does not already exist).  
2. From the existing /home/user/mobile_ci/build_pipeline.log, generate a plain-text summary file named /home/user/mobile_ci/reports/failure_report_20230821.txt.  
3. The summary file must strictly follow the exact format described below so that automated tests can validate it:  

    • Line 1: “Total_Failures: X” where X is the total number of log entries whose status is exactly the string FAILED.  
    • Starting on line 2: list every module that appears in a FAILED line, but list each module only once.  
      – Each module line must start with a hyphen followed by a single space “- ”.  
      – The module names must be ordered alphabetically (UTF-8 byte order).  
    • End the file with a single trailing newline character (Unix LF).  

Example (values will differ):  
Total_Failures: 7  
- feature-login  
- networking  
- ui  

Important notes  
• Do NOT alter the original build_pipeline.log file.  
• The script/commands you use are up to you, but the final state of the file failure_report_20230821.txt must exactly match the specification above.  
• Use only tools available in a standard Debian/Ubuntu shell (grep, awk, sort, uniq, etc.).  
• Once done, ensure the report file exists at the correct path so that automated grading can locate it.
truth:
Pre-existing workspace content  
Path: /home/user/mobile_ci/build_pipeline.log  
Contents (8 lines, each ending with a Unix LF):  
[2023-08-21 10:01:03] BUILD 101: core - SUCCESS  
[2023-08-21 10:05:47] BUILD 102: ui - FAILED  
[2023-08-21 10:12:11] BUILD 103: networking - SUCCESS  
[2023-08-21 10:15:29] BUILD 104: feature-auth - FAILED  
[2023-08-21 10:22:58] BUILD 105: feature-payments - FAILED  
[2023-08-21 10:30:42] BUILD 106: analytics - SUCCESS  
[2023-08-21 10:33:27] BUILD 107: push-notifications - SUCCESS  
[2023-08-21 10:38:55] BUILD 108: ui - FAILED  
(EOF)  

Expected artefact for verification  
Path: /home/user/mobile_ci/reports/failure_report_20230821.txt  
Exact required contents (4 physical lines, each terminated with Unix LF):  
Total_Failures: 4  
- feature-auth  
- feature-payments  
- ui  
(EOF)
